TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Alpha_Cond√©, title = Alpha_Cond√©, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alpha_Cond√©} }

S.FORM: = Alpha Cond√© = Alpha Cond√© (kngkawas 1938 idas 3 diyax 4-) kiya ka seyjicya Guinea, kndadax kngkawas 2010 idas 12 psdhuwan phiyu soto Guinea. MnAfrika Ryeynmong cusi uri (kngkawas 2017 idas 1 diyax 30 wada mangal). Hiya pa dmuwi 20 knkawas hantay brah soto Lansana Cont√©, kiya ka hantay tang Guineas Jnmin Ryeynmong cusi. Mniq kngkawas 2010 kcka soto knbeyhing seyngkyo cida, wada balay mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo cida mbiyax mangal soto Guineas; kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2015 ka wada mangal soto Dungan. Taxa kndusan niya Alpha Cond√© pa wada mangal qridin das, niqan taxa laqi niya snaw, wa mniq Amirika muyas ka saya. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = alpńßa ¶ond* = alpńßa ¶ond* (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *-) kija ka s…ô…üi ¶ja guin…ôa, kndadax kŇčkawas **** idas ** psdńßuwan pńßiju soto guin…ôa. mna*…ĺika …ĺj…ônmoŇč ¶usi u…ĺi (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** wada maŇčal). ńßija pa dmuwi ** knkawas ńßantaj b…ĺańß soto lansana ¶ont*, kija ka ńßantaj taŇč guin…ôas …ünmin …ĺj…ônmoŇč ¶usi. mniq kŇčkawas **** k ¶ka soto knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, wada balaj mniq tumn* m…ôtaq ńßjo ¶ida mbijax maŇčal soto guin…ôas; kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** ka wada maŇčal soto duŇčan. taxa kndusan nija alpńßa ¶ond* pa wada maŇčal q…ĺidin das, niqan taxa laqi nija snaw, wa mniq ami…ĺika mujas ka saja. == pnjańßan pnatas ==
S.FORM: = Alpha Cond√© = Alpha Cond√© (kngkawas 1938 idas 3 diyax 4-) kiya ka seyjicya Guinea, kndadax kngkawas 2010 idas 12 psdhuwan phiyu soto Guinea. MnAfrika Ryeynmong cusi uri (kngkawas 2017 idas 1 diyax 30 wada mangal). Hiya pa dmuwi 20 knkawas hantay brah soto Lansana Cont√©, kiya ka hantay tang Guineas Jnmin Ryeynmong cusi. Mniq kngkawas 2010 kcka soto knbeyhing seyngkyo cida, wada balay mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo cida mbiyax mangal soto Guineas; kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2015 ka wada mangal soto Dungan. Taxa kndusan niya Alpha Cond√© pa wada mangal qridin das, niqan taxa laqi niya snaw, wa mniq Amirika muyas ka saya. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = alpńßa ¶ond* = alpńßa ¶ond* (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *-) kija ka s…ô…üi ¶ja guin…ôa, kndadax kŇčkawas **** idas ** psdńßuwan pńßiju soto guin…ôa. mna*…ĺika …ĺj…ônmoŇč ¶usi u…ĺi (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** wada maŇčal). ńßija pa dmuwi ** knkawas ńßantaj b…ĺańß soto lansana ¶ont*, kija ka ńßantaj taŇč guin…ôas …ünmin …ĺj…ônmoŇč ¶usi. mniq kŇčkawas **** k ¶ka soto knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, wada balaj mniq tumn* m…ôtaq ńßjo ¶ida mbijax maŇčal soto guin…ôas; kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** ka wada maŇčal soto duŇčan. taxa kndusan nija alpńßa ¶ond* pa wada maŇčal q…ĺidin das, niqan taxa laqi nija snaw, wa mniq ami…ĺika mujas ka saja. == pnjańßan pnatas ==
